positive: Stylized symmetrical composition featuring a mythical creature (e.g., a phoenix, winged serpent, or guardian lion) amidst geometric patterns and celestial elements. The main subject should have a bold, clean silhouette with vibrant, contrasting colors (deep sapphire blues, burnt oranges, emerald greens) against a cream or dusty rose background. Utilize dotwork, linework, and negative space for depth. High contrast, Art Deco/Mythological stencil style, full-color digital illustration, vector quality, centered composition, suitable for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, messy background, gradients, logos, signatures, copyrighted
